name: Sheng Wang
bio: Sheng Wang is a Taiwanese-American stand-up comedian and writer who grew up in Houston and is known for a laid-back, observational style built on small everyday absurdities. He worked as a staff writer on the ABC sitcom Fresh Off the Boat from 2015 to 2018 and competed in the 2015 season of Last Comic Standing. His first Netflix special, Sweet and Juicy, directed by Ali Wong, was released in 2022 to wide praise.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up in San Francisco after graduating Berkeley
Airs first Comedy Central Presents half-hour; wins NBC Stand Up for Diversity
Joins Fresh Off the Boat writers room; top 10 on Last Comic Standing
Opens for John Mulaney at Clusterfest
Releases first Netflix special Sweet and Juicy

accolades: Winner, NBC Stand Up for Diversity (2011)
Netflix special Sweet and Juicy directed by Ali Wong (2022)
